Real Installations
Honey Oak & Coastal Grey

SPC Flooring uses Stone Plastic Composite as its core — combining the strength of limestone with the versatility of stabilizers. The high-density core resists expansion and contraction even through extreme temperature changes, making it dimensionally stable for years.

100% waterproof & rigid. A specialized UV coating provides exceptional scratch and stain resistance — ideal for kitchens, high-traffic commercial areas, bedrooms, and living spaces throughout the home.

Technical Specification

Engineered for
Every Room

Every SPC Flooring panel is built on a rigid Stone Plastic Composite core — formaldehyde-free, 100% recyclable, and engineered to outlast traditional laminate or vinyl flooring with minimal upkeep.

Ask About Installation
Plank Size1220mm (L) × 180mm (W)
Thickness Range4mm – 8mm
Core MaterialStone Plastic Composite
Surface FinishUV-Coated, Scratch Resistant
Waterproof Rating100% Waterproof Core
Emission StandardFormaldehyde-Free
Matching Accessories & Trims

Complete the Installation Properly

Every SPC Flooring installation is finished with the right trims and transitions — available in matching colours to your chosen floor design.

Skirting

Finishes the base of the wall where it meets the floor, hiding expansion gaps cleanly.

L-Profile

Protects and finishes external corners and step edges with a crisp right-angle line.

A-Profile

A reducer/transition piece that bridges height differences between two flooring types.

U-Profile

Caps exposed flooring edges at thresholds, stairs, or open ends for a clean finish.

T-Profile

Joins two flooring sections at the same height — ideal for doorways between rooms.

All accessories can be matched to the same colour as your selected flooring design.
